system.description: You carry dissolution resonance from prior hunts — fragments of what you have ended, partially integrated. Your attacks against Shell-states and Iron Afterlife entities deal + RESONANCE additional damage. Incoming necrotic and signal damage is reduced by your RESONANCE (minimum 0). Once per combat, the absorbed resonance may surface as a behavioral impression — a flash of the hunted creature's perspective (GM narrates; no mechanical penalty unless you choose to act on it).
